query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invitation_tokens' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invitation_tokens' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
stdout:
